scan-all-mailboxes.prompt: IMPORTANT: Before generating any report, read and follow ALL rules in Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/report-rules.md. Scan all enabled Gmail mailboxes for new emails. Run from Q:/src/personal_projects/gmail-manager/: python -m src --scan-all. After the scan completes: If no meaningful work was done (no new emails found across all mailboxes), do NOT generate an HTML report -- just output 'Email scan: no new emails across N mailboxes.' (replacing N with the actual count) and exit. Only generate a full report when at least one new email was found in any mailbox. You MUST use the fixed template at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/templates/emailer-scan.html. Read the template file, then replace all {{PLACEHOLDER}} values with actual data. Replace {{VO_SUBTITLE}} with: Agent: Emailer | Job: scan-all-mailboxes | Start: <PST timestamp when job started> | Complete: <PST timestamp when report is generated>. Replace {{MAILBOX_CARDS}} with one card block per mailbox containing: mailbox name, email address, message counts by category (auto-delete, review, keep, rollup), and actions executed. Save the report to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/emailer/scan-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html (using local time, zero-padded) and also as scan-latest.html in the same directory.
scan-all-mailboxes.description: Scans all Gmail mailboxes, classifies emails, generates daily digest
